title: Flip Case
description:
For a given string, flip lowercase characters to uppercase and uppercase to lowercase.
    >>> flip_case('Hello')
    'hELLO'
skeleton_code:

input: These violent delights have violent ends
test_cases.expected: tHESE VIOLENT DELIGHTS HAVE VIOLENT ENDS
